.file-embed.background: rgb(26, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, rgb(0, 0, 0) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(rgb(0, 0, 0), color-mix(in srgb, rgb(0, 0, 0) 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, rgb(0, 0, 0) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(rgb(0, 0, 0), color-mix(in srgb, rgb(0, 0, 0) 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgba(255, 0, 0, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgba(255, 0, 0, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(245, 92, 92, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

img.filter: grayscale(1) brightness(0.2) sepia(1) hue-rotate(-50deg) saturate(10) contrast(1)

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(41, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(26, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(26, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(26, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
